# matrix_room_state (Resource)

Sends an arbitrary state event. Escape hatch for anything not covered by typed resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matrix_room_state" "history_world_readable" {
  room_id      = matrix_room.example.id
  event_type   = "m.room.history_visibility"
  state_key    = ""
  content_json = jsonencode({ history_visibility = "world_readable" })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content_json` (String) JSON-encoded state event content. Compared semantically, so whitespace/key order don't trigger drift.
- `event_type` (String)
- `room_id` (String)

### Optional

- `state_key` (String) Defaults to empty string.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite: <room_id>|<event_type>|<state_key>.
